notableMoments: Third place at the 2002 World Cup was a stunning achievement on just their second appearance
Hakan Şükür scored the fastest goal in World Cup history (11 seconds) vs South Korea in the 2002 third-place match
Beat co-hosts South Korea in the 2002 third-place match
Eliminated Senegal in the 2002 semi-final with a golden goal
48-year gap between their first (1954) and second (2002) World Cup appearances
Returning to the World Cup in 2026 after a 24-year absence
